transcription.text: It's been one week since you looked at me Cause your head is on the side and I'm hungry Five days since you laughed at me saying We'll never come back and see me Yesterday you've forgiven me But it'll still be today till I say I'm sorry Gonna make a rickety-dickety-dickety-dickety-dickety-dickety Drink out like vanilla, it's the finest of the flavors Gonna see the chocos and you'll know that vertical was And my dough is in the banger as you love to sign a waiver I have a tendency to wear my mind in my sleep I haven't seen you since you've been It's been one week since you looked at me Drop your ass to the side and say I'm sorry Thank you.

segments.text: It's been one week since you looked at me
Cause your head is on the side and I'm hungry
Five days since you laughed at me saying
We'll never come back and see me
But it'll still be today till I say I'm sorry
Drink out like vanilla, it's the finest of the flavors
Gonna see the chocos and you'll know that vertical was
And my dough is in the banger as you love to sign a waiver
I have a tendency to wear my mind in my sleep
I haven't seen you since you've been
It's been one week since you looked at me
Drop your ass to the side and say I'm sorry
